name: ssh-skill
description: Secure SSH profile workflows for reusable server access and remote Supabase CLI execution.

interface.shortDescription: Secure SSH profile setup and remote Supabase workflows
interface.longDescription: Use SSH Skill to create reusable host aliases in ~/.ssh/config, connect safely with key-based authentication, and run Supabase CLI commands on remote servers through guarded SSH wrappers.
defaultPrompt: Set up a secure SSH profile alias for this server in ~/.ssh/config
Connect to my server by SSH alias and run a remote Supabase status check
Run safe remote Supabase migration commands over SSH with confirmation gates
